mapper.select:
SELECT [帐号] AS ma001,[姓名] AS ma002 FROM QYWX
AND [帐号] LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ma001}, '%')
AND [姓名] LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ma002}, '%')
SELECT LOGONNAME ma001, USER_NAME ma002 FROM [USER]

SELECT * FROM DSCMA WHERE 1 = 1
AND MA001 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ma001}, '%')
AND MA002 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ma002}, '%')

SELECT EMPLOYEE_CODE ma001, EMPLOYEE_NAME ma002, ISNULL(xs, 0) AS xs, 0 sc, 0 money, deptName workCenter FROM EMPLOYEE LEFT JOIN employeeXs ON EMPLOYEE_CODE COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS = employeeXs.employeeNo WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM PersonSignInOut WHERE creatorNo = EMPLOYEE_CODE COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS)
AND deptName = '总装一课'
AND deptName = '总装二课'
AND EMPLOYEE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{ma002}, '%')

SELECT EMPLOYEE_CODE ma001, EMPLOYEE_NAME ma002, ISNULL(xs, 0) AS xs, 0 sc, 0 money, deptName workCenter FROM EMPLOYEE LEFT JOIN employeeXs ON EMPLOYEE_CODE COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS = employeeXs.employeeNo WHERE EXISTS(SELECT * FROM PersonSignInOut WHERE udf04 = #{date} AND ISNULL(udf06, '') != '' AND creatorNo = EMPLOYEE_CODE COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CS_AS)

SELECT MA001 userNo, MA002 userName, UDF01 deptNo FROM DSCMA WHERE 1 = 1
AND MA001 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userNo}, '%')
AND MA002 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND UDF01 = #{deptNo}
